title: 3 Stocks Gearing Up for an E-Commerce Liftoff
text: In line with my previous predictions calling for an e-commerce rebound in the second half of this year, it appears that the e-commerce sector is recovering. In a note to investors in July, investment advisor Bernstein wrote, “with (foreign exchange) headwinds abating and a more durable online consumer, count us in that camp of anticipating further eCommerce recovery.

title: International Paper to Release Third Quarter 2023 Earnings on October 26, 2023
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn. , Sept. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- International Paper (NYSE: IP) will release third-quarter 2023 earnings on October 26, 2023, before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange.

title: Here are the 15 stocks Jim Cramer is watching, including 3 recent IPOs and Starbucks
text: Here are some of the tickers on my radar for Thursday, Sept. 21, taken directly from my reporter's notebook.

title: International Paper (IP) Opens Corrugated Packaging Facility
text: International Paper (IP) announces the opening of its newest facility in Atglen for its Corrugated Packaging business.

title: International Paper Completes Sale of Ownership Interest in Ilim Joint Venture
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn. , Sept. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- International Paper (NYSE: IP) today announced that it has completed the sale of its 50% interest in Ilim SA, the holding company for its Ilim joint venture (JV), to its JV partners for $484MM (USD) in cash.

title: International Paper Opens Its Newest Corrugated Packaging Facility in Atglen, Pennsylvania
text: ATGLEN, Pa., Sept. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, International Paper (NYSE: IP) celebrated the opening of its newest state-of-the-art corrugated packaging facility in Atglen, PA.

title: International Paper Announces CEO Succession Plan
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn. , Sept. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- International Paper (NYSE: IP) announced today that Chairman and CEO Mark Sutton has requested that the Board of Directors move forward with the next phase of the company's CEO succession plan.

title: 4 Paper and Related Products Stocks Countering Industry Headwinds
text: The Zacks Paper and Related Products industry's prospects look dull as low consumer spending is impacting demand. Despite this, stocks like IP, SMFKY, WRK and SPPJY are well-poised to gain from their growth initiatives.

title: International Paper Could Unbox a Pleasant Surprise for Investors
text: Sustained gains in e-commerce—and a reduced inventory glut—should help the manufacturer.
